_comment: Canned 1024-dim embedding vectors keyed by sha256(text)[:16]. Loaded by brickvision_runtime.capability_graph.embed.embed_batch() when BV_FAKE_LLM=true. Override the fixture path via BV_FAKE_LLM_EMBEDDINGS_FIXTURE. Vectors use a deterministic sinusoidal seed so smoke tests can assert vector-space behaviour without needing real embeddings; in production the same code path runs Mosaic AI Foundation Model Serving against databricks-gte-large-en.
